Notes 2: Hi Team,Cinema Verde has been curating independent environmental films since 2010, so I figured you already understand the value of a sustainable future, and that probably extends to your own workplace.Here in the state, we've seen plenty of companies with 401(k) plans that were set up by well-meaning advisors who added the benefit as a side offering. The catch is that most of those advisors do not supply the specialized fiduciary support, annual reviews, and participant education the Department of Labor expects. That gap can expose the organization to compliance headaches and leave employees without the guidance they paid for through plan fees.Those services are already baked into the plan cost, yet many advisors lack the process or credentials to deliver them.We plug in alongside your record keeper to handle the boardroom duties and the breakroom workshops so the plan stays clean and the crew actually learns how to use it.If you'd like a quick check to confirm you're getting everything you're already paying for, let me know the easiest way to connect and we can set up a brief call.Best Regards,Chris Krueger

Subject: Take Action: Fix burdensome new IRS reporting threshold for online services
Email Text:
Say No to More Tax Burdens!
A new law means millions of Americans, including many event creators, will receive extra IRS scrutiny for low-dollar online transactions.

 

Event creators and other online sellers face enough financial and administrative burdens while working to build followings, host successful events, and foster meaningful social connection. The last thing needed is a new tax law that reduces the minimum IRS 1099-K reporting threshold for online sales of goods and services from $20,000 in annual payments and 200 transactions to just $600 and one transaction.


Click here to tell your members of Congress to fix this burdensome requirement. Don’t worry - it’s easy and will take you less than five minutes to participate. There is even a pre-written script that you can choose to keep intact or adjust to your own voice.
